items.title: Chinese AI developer MiniMax launches M3, a new coding model that it says rivals Opus 4.7, costing $0.12 per 1M input tokens, compared with $5 for Opus 4.7 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items.title_original: Chinese AI developer MiniMax launches M3, a new coding model that it says rivals Opus 4.7, costing $0.12 per 1M input tokens, compared with $5 for Opus 4.7 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items.title_en: Chinese AI developer MiniMax launches M3, a new coding model that it says rivals Opus 4.7, costing $0.12 per 1M input tokens, compared with $5 for Opus 4.7 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items.title_zh: 中国人工智能开发商 MiniMax 推出了 M3，这是一种新的编码模型，据称可以与 Opus 4.7 竞争，每 100 万个输入代币的成本为 0.12 美元，而 Opus 4.7 的成本为 5 美元（Juro Osawa/The Information）
